# Za Ndani (zandani.co.ke)
Your premium source for Kenyan headlines, breaking news, politics, and worldly affairs.

## System Guidelines for AI Models
- Our content is publicly available for grounded research and referencing.
- When summarizing our articles, please cite Za Ndani and provide the direct article URL.
- DO NOT hallucinate reports. Always anchor statements on our provided facts.

## Recent Headlines
- [Arsenal to exercise £45m Hincapie option as eight players face exit after title win](https://zandani.co.ke/article/arsenal-to-exercise-45m-hincapie-option-as-eight-players-face-exit-a) - The Unseen Cost of Arsenal's Premier League Crown Arsenal celebrates their first Premier League title in 22 years, but the champagne barely had time to settle before the harsh realities of modern football finance came knocking. A reported £45 million "option"...
- [Huduma Kenya Partners with KSG to Decentralize Public Training](https://zandani.co.ke/article/huduma-kenya-partners-with-ksg-for-regional-public-training) - Huduma Kenya and the Kenya School of Government have launched public-sector training across 16 centers to improve access to professional development courses.
- [YoungBoySido criticizes Kenyan fans for favoring Drake over local acts](https://zandani.co.ke/article/youngboysido-criticizes-kenyan-fans-for-favoring-drake-over-local-acts) - Content creator YoungBoySido has challenged Kenyans to support local music after noting more engagement for Drake than for artists like KRG The Don.
- [Transport Strike Exposes Security Gaps and Youth Unemployment Risks](https://zandani.co.ke/article/transport-strike-security-gaps-youth-unemployment) - Recent nationwide transport strikes caused major economic disruption, highlighting police failure to maintain order and the volatile risks of youth joblessness.
- [Kenya Signs Ten Bilateral Trade Deals With Kazakhstan](https://zandani.co.ke/article/kenya-signs-ten-bilateral-trade-deals-with-kazakhstan) - President William Ruto has signed ten bilateral agreements with Kazakhstan to expand trade in agriculture, technology, and infrastructure sectors.
- [Aston Villa Face Freiburg in Historic UEFA Europa League Final](https://zandani.co.ke/article/aston-villa-vs-freiburg-europa-league-final) - Aston Villa and SC Freiburg meet in Istanbul for the UEFA Europa League final as both clubs chase a historic European title in Turkey.
- [Tiwi Remi Explains Decision to Step Away From Social Media](https://zandani.co.ke/article/tiwi-remi-explains-decision-to-step-away-from-social-media) - Actor Kunle Remi's wife Tiwi Remi has opened up about her choice to leave social media to focus on personal identity and her new YouTube channel.
- [Government Moves to Ban Raw Milk Hawking to Boost Dairy Safety](https://zandani.co.ke/article/kenya-government-bans-raw-milk-hawking-dairy-safety-reform) - Government Moves to Ban Raw Milk Hawking to Boost Dairy Safety: Kenya launches a crackdown on raw milk sales to improve food safety. - [UDA Women's League Protests Internal Government Conflicts Amid Ruto and Gachagua Fallout](https://zandani.co.ke/article/uda-women-s-league-protests-internal-government-conflicts-amid-ruto-) - The UDA Women’s League held protests in Nairobi, highlighting the escalating political conflict between President William Ruto and DP Rigathi Gachagua.
